title: Trump and Iran Dominate the Agenda as Europe’s Leaders Meet. Here Are 4 Things to Know.
summary_full: A gathering in Brussels was meant to concentrate on jump-starting the E.U. economy. Instead, the fallout of the war in the Middle East took front and center.
